query_text: WITH channel_items AS (SELECT ws_item_sk AS item_sk FROM web_sales UNION ALL SELECT cs_item_sk FROM catalog_sales) SELECT i.i_item_id FROM item AS i JOIN channel_items AS c ON i.i_item_sk = c.item_sk WHERE i.i_color ILIKE '%purple%' OR i.i_product_name ~* '^item[0-9]+$'
query_text_template: WITH channel_items AS (SELECT ws_item_sk AS item_sk FROM web_sales UNION ALL SELECT cs_item_sk FROM catalog_sales) SELECT i.i_item_id FROM item AS i JOIN channel_items AS c ON i.i_item_sk = c.item_sk WHERE i.i_color ILIKE '%&CHARACTER%' OR i.i_product_name ~* '^&CHARACTER[0-9]+$'
